expectations.evidence: Full structure created: CLAUDE.md, TASKS.md, dashboard.html, memory/people/ (2 profiles), memory/projects/japan-trip.md, memory/itinerary.md, memory/glossary.md, memory/sessions/session-log-mar31-a.md.
memory/people/me.md and memory/people/alex.md created as separate profile files with health, dietary, interests, and anxiety details.

CLAUDE.md Open Questions explicitly flags: 'Temperature units: Celsius or Fahrenheit?', 'Currency display: USD, CAD, JPY, or mixed?'. Preferences section shows 'Currency: TBD', 'Temperature units: TBD'. Not assumed.
TASKS.md Up Next section: '1. Phase 2: Route — Compare routes, decide cities, order, and night allocation'. Session log also recommends Phase 2 as next step.

CLAUDE.md line 29: 'Alex (omnivore, bad knee from old injury)' — factual, not medicalized. Project file: 'cumulative pain on long days and with stairs. Details being clarified. Will shape hotel location, activity pacing, and daily structure.' Framed as comfort consideration.

Flagged in THREE places: (1) CLAUDE.md Open Questions line 38: 'Booking philosophy: Flexibility vs cost vs comfort balance? Hotel star preference?', (2) TASKS.md line 9: 'Decide booking philosophy — Flexibility vs cost vs comfort?', (3) Project file lines 31-35: full 'Hotel Philosophy' section with star levels, refundability, amenity questions.

CLAUDE.md is 78 lines. Contains no session protocol steps, no phase descriptions, no research methodology, no planning principles. Purely project state: Me, People, Terms, Projects, Status, Open Questions, Preferences, File Map.

CLAUDE.md People table (lines 7-11): '| **Me** | Traveler, planner |' and '| **Alex** | Partner, travel companion |' with '→ Full profiles: memory/people/'. No health, dietary, anxiety, or interest details inline. Matches the skill's correct example exactly.
SCAFFOLDING_COMPLETE.txt and VERIFICATION.md were created — these are meta files about the scaffolding process, not part of the defined project structure.
Currency: 'TBD'. Temperature: 'TBD'. Both flagged as open questions. No silent assumptions made.

Project file (78 lines) has distinct content: Key Constraints section with detailed knee/language/budget analysis, Strategic Decisions section with City Selection and Hotel Philosophy subsections, Flight Strategy with CPP analysis questions, Payment Status table, Loyalty & Points Tracking table, and phased Questions & Follow-ups. CLAUDE.md is a lean index pointing to this file.
